scenes.goal: In one sentence — what Code2MP4 does
scenes.visual: Warm off-white canvas (#F5F0EB). Serif headline (Playfair Display) in rust accent (#C44F34). Generous whitespace, no distractions.
scenes.motion: Title fades in slowly (power2.out, 0.8s). Tagline slides up after 2s delay.

scenes.goal: Why it exists — agents need video output, not black boxes
scenes.visual: Split layout. Left: flow diagram (Prompt → Storyboard → Source → MP4) with rust accent connecting arrows. Right: headline + body.
scenes.text:
Agents can write code.
Now they can write videos.

Not black-box generation.
Editable, deterministic, Git-friendly video source.
scenes.motion: Flow diagram draws in left-to-right. Text reveals line by line with 0.5s stagger.

scenes.goal: Architecture overview — the pipeline that makes it work
scenes.visual: Three cards in sequence: 'Prompt Stack' (7 layers), 'Multi-Agent Pipeline' (Director → Scene → Assembly), 'Render Engine' (HyperFrames + FFmpeg). Cards on warm off-white with hairline borders.
scenes.text:
How it works

1. Prompt stack — 7 layers of video-specific guidance
2. Agent pipeline — Director plans, Scene agents execute
3. Render engine — Deterministic HTML → MP4
scenes.motion: Cards reveal sequentially from left (0.6s stagger). Card content fades in after reveal. Number indicators draw circles.

scenes.goal: Three commands to start — make it feel accessible
scenes.visual: Terminal-style card on warm background. Monospace font for commands, amber accent for caret. Three lines with subtle glow.
scenes.text:
Get started

git clone https://github.com/code2mp4/code2mp4
pnpm install && pnpm dev
Open http://localhost:7456
scenes.motion: Caret blinks at start. Lines type out sequentially (0.3s per line). Last line highlights with subtle glow.
